readings.summary: I will put enmity between your offspring and her offspring.

readings.citation:
Ps 130:1–2, 3–4, 5–6, 7–8
With the Lord there is mercy, and fullness of redemption.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 130:1–2, 3–4, 5–6, 7–8
With the Lord there is mercy, and fullness of redemption.

readings.summary: We too believe and therefore we speak.

Now the ruler of this world will be driven out, says the Lord;
and when I am lifted up from the earth, I will draw everyone to myself.
It is the end of Satan.

antiphons.text:
The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear?
The Lord is the stronghold of my life; whom should I dread?
When those who do evil draw near, they stumble and fall.

The Lord is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer;
my God is my saving strength.

God is love, and whoever abides in love
abides in God, and God in him.

penitentialAct.title: Kyrie • Misa Del Mundo
penitentialAct.composer: Only if needed. Talk to presider!

and when I am lifted up from the earth, I will draw everyone to myself.
